span.p: Section 4: Jurisdiction over public servants for offences committed outside S...

span.p: Every public servant who, being a citizen or a permanent resident of Singapore

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
